name: Trace Atlas Provenance
description: A compact ledger of the verified steps that turned an empty repository into Trace Atlas.

entries.title: Create Trace Atlas artifact
entries.summary: Built the first static interactive memory map with canvas traces, local storage, JSON export, and baseline verification.

entries.title: Add archive tools
entries.summary: Added JSON import, automatic tour playback, keyboard stepping, and runtime verification for archive recovery.

entries.title: Add capsule links
entries.summary: Made local traces portable through URL hash capsules and verified restoration from a fresh runtime.

entries.title: Add offline shell
entries.summary: Registered a manifest, SVG icon, and service worker so the app shell can survive after the first load.

entries.title: Add SVG snapshots
entries.summary: Added a static SVG constellation export with metadata and hardened color handling for imported traces.

entries.title: Add archive fingerprints
entries.summary: Added deterministic fingerprints across UI, JSON export, capsule payloads, and SVG snapshots.
